text:
Code reviews are an essential part of software development. When a developer finishes writing code, a colleague examines it carefully. This process helps catch bugs early, before they cause bigger problems in the project. It is much easier and cheaper to fix mistakes at this stage than later.

Beyond finding errors, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing. Team members learn different approaches and techniques from each other. This spreads expertise across the team, so no single person holds all the knowledge. Over time, this builds a stronger, more consistent codebase and improves overall team quality.
